mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECALL_LOGIN (member_no, id, pw, role) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{id}, #{pw}, 'ROLE_USER')
INSERT INTO RECALL_MEMBER (email, name, phone_number) VALUES (#{email}, #{name}, #{phoneNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT id as id , pw as pw , member_no as memberNo FROM RECALL_LOGIN WHERE id = #{id}
